title: Sparkle: sample landing template
desc: Demonstration landing page. All text is sample (dummy) content.

sections.sub: Sparkle sends vetted cleaners who show up on time, bring their own supplies, and leave every room spotless.
From a quick refresh to a deep scrub, one team handles the whole home with care.
cards: Every surface wiped, dusted and polished, top to bottom.
Your cleaner shows up in the window you booked, every time.
Background-checked pros, fully insured for your peace of mind.
Gentle, non-toxic supplies that are safe for kids and pets.
Book one-off or recurring cleans and reschedule in a tap.
Not thrilled? We come back and re-clean for free.

sections.text: Pick your home size, choose a date, and tell us what matters most. No quotes, no callbacks, just a confirmed time.
bullets: Pick your own cleaner over time
Free rescheduling up to 24 hours ahead

sections.text: Your cleaner arrives with professional supplies and a room-by-room checklist, so nothing gets missed and you do nothing at all.
bullets: Photo summary when the job is done

sections.sub: No quotes, no hassle, no mess left behind.
steps: Share the size and what needs the most attention.
Choose a date and window that fits your week.
Relax while your cleaner makes every room shine.

sections.quote: I booked in two minutes and came home to a spotless apartment. The cleaner was friendly, thorough and even folded the throw blankets.
sections.author: Sample Person

sections.sub: Pick the clean you need. No hidden fees, ever.

items: Do I need to provide supplies?
No. Your cleaner arrives with all professional supplies and equipment included in the price.
Yes. Every cleaner is background-checked, trained and fully insured before their first job.
Can I book a recurring clean?
Absolutely. Choose weekly, biweekly or monthly and save on every recurring visit.
What if I am not happy?
Tell us within 24 hours and we will return to re-clean the area for free, guaranteed.
Payment is secure and online. You are only charged after the clean is complete.

sections.sub: Book in under a minute and come home to a place that shines.

sections.tagline: Vetted cleaners, flat pricing and a spotless finish every time. Sample dummy brand for template preview.
sections.copyright: // Sparkle is a sample template with dummy content
